summary_en: Retirement reception will begin at 4 p.m. on May 19 at Clark Hall.

title: Less water, same taste: New approach helps growers produce sweet corn more efficiently
summary_en: University of Missouri researchers find farmers can cut back on water without losing crop quality.
title_cn: 密苏里大学研究形成甜玉米节水高效种植技术 减少用水量同时保障作物品质

title: Mizzou veterinarian helps decode animal health
summary_en: Lauren Delaney serves as the bridge between veterinarians and the expertise of Mizzou’s Veterinary Medical Diagnostic Laboratory, helping solve complex cases and protect animal health across Missouri and beyond.
title_cn: 密苏里大学兽医人员助力破解动物健康难题

title: Meet a Mizzou Law student ambassador

title: Office spaces, collections put professors’ personalities on display
summary_en: From children’s books to vintage cameras, personal and professional items reveal the people who bring the University of Missouri to life.
title_cn: 密苏里大学展示教授办公空间与个人藏品 展现教师个性特质与育人理念
